name: @metorial/pinecone
description: Manage Pinecone vector database indexes and records for AI applications. Create and configure serverless, BYOC, integrated-embedding, and legacy pod indexes. Upsert, search, fetch, update, list, and delete vectors with metadata filtering and namespace partitioning. Work with integrated-embedding text records, hosted embedding/reranking models, and Pinecone Assistants with files, context retrieval, and grounded chat.
